name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Build a DataTable component for displaying a list of stock holdings with columns: ticker, company name, current price, daily change %, and market cap. Include sortable column headers.
assertions: Response styles table headers with 11px font-size, uppercase text-transform, and `var(--text-muted)` color
Response uses `JetBrains Mono` font-family for numeric columns (price, change %, market cap)
Response right-aligns numeric data columns (price, change %, market cap)
Response uses `var(--border-subtle)` for row separator borders and `var(--border)` for the header border-bottom
Response styles the first column (ticker or company name) with `var(--text-primary)` and font-weight 500
